_comment: Public-source due-diligence data for Able.cz s.r.o. Every entry carries an evidence status. Nothing here is invented: where public sources did not resolve a question in this pass, the status is NOT_FOUND and the figure is absent, not guessed. Recorded 2026-07-17 from the sources listed below. Re-verify against primary registers before relying on any current fact.

meta.subject: Able.cz s.r.o.
meta.scope: Public-evidence due diligence. Not a full transaction due diligence: no data room, management Q&A, contracts, bank records, tax files, or source-code access were available.

statusLegend.VERIFIED_PRIMARY: Directly supported by a primary/authoritative source.
statusLegend.CORROBORATED: Supported by two or more independent sources.
statusLegend.SELF_REPORTED: Asserted by Able or an affiliated source, not independently verified.
statusLegend.ASSESSED: Analytical reading of the cited evidence.
statusLegend.NOT_FOUND: Searched for in public sources; not resolved in this pass.
statusLegend.UNKNOWN: Public evidence does not resolve the question.

sources.title: Czech public register / ARES (via justice.cz-sourced mirrors: kurzy.cz, penize.cz, podnikatel.cz)
Google Public DNS (dns.google) — A/MX/NS for able.cz

identity.value: Krajský soud v Brně (Regional Court in Brno)

contradictions.resolution: The public register value (C 85425) is the authoritative one. The value on the company's own legal page (C 85424) is most plausibly a transcription error or a stale copy. This is recorded, not silently normalized.

governance.note: The register records the statutory body and shareholders below. Marketing job titles on the website (e.g. CTO, CSO) are not the same as statutory officers and are shown separately. Not every website leader is a registered statutory officer.

signingRule.text: A statutory officer acts independently, except for acts of property management or monetary obligations above 200,000 CZK (excl. VAT), which require all statutory officers to act jointly.

marketingLeadership.name: Václav Faraga
marketingLeadership.corroboration: Also confirmed via LinkedIn (SRC-06) and as a statutory officer (SRC-03).

marketingLeadership.name: Radek Juhaňák
marketingLeadership.corroboration: Shareholder per register (SRC-03); statutory status not confirmed.

marketingLeadership.name: Lukáš Grolig
marketingLeadership.corroboration: Not found in the register statutory body or shareholder list in this pass — a marketing role, not a verified statutory office.

financials.note: Czech s.r.o. financial statements are filed in the Collection of Deeds (Sbírka listin) at justice.cz. They were not retrieved in this pass, so revenue, profit, assets, and headcount are NOT_FOUND here rather than estimated. The only hard figure is registered capital.

selfReported.metric: Combined revenue target (Able + Blackfish, stated year)
selfReported.note: A forward-looking target attributed to Vít Schlesinger in media, not a filed result.

selfReported.metric: Tenders won in the stated year (combined)
Combined contract value of those tenders

claims.text: Client data never used to train external LLMs
AI agents run in an isolated environment
NDA and DPA signed on every project

claims.note: The GDPR page (SRC-01) states no intent to transfer personal data to third countries, which is consistent but is itself a company statement, not independent proof.

claims.text: Acquired 100% of product studio Blackfish; founder Vít Schlesinger stayed to lead business strategy
claims.note: Reported consistently by two independent media outlets.

claims.text: Named clients incl. AAA Auto, Aures Holdings, Arkadia, Encall, Taste Town
claims.note: Published by Able; a named client is evidence of a stated relationship, not of the quantified result.

timeline.event: Able.cz s.r.o. incorporated; Faraga and Melichárek registered as statutory officers.
Able acquires 100% of Blackfish studio; combined team ~60; stated further-acquisition intent.
Most recent change observed in the public register.

openQuestions: Filed financial statements (revenue, result, assets, headcount) — available at justice.cz Sbírka listin, not retrieved in this pass.
Whether the marketing roles CTO (Grolig) and CSO (Juhaňák) correspond to any current statutory function.
Independent client confirmation of the quantified case-study results (ROI, person-days).
Public-sector contracts and any EU-cofinanced project details (Hlídač státu and grant registers not retrieved here).
Current combined headcount and revenue as filed, versus the self-reported target.

graph._comment: Entity/relationship graph and the substrate for the investigation workspace. Every node and edge carries investigation metadata (type, categories, validFrom, why, confidence, first/last observed, sources) so the graph UI can act as a portal into the evidence. Every edge is grounded in a cited source. Node groups: subject, person, entity, client, investor, domain, legal. `expand` marks which lazy-expansion group reveals a non-core node (null = always shown). Nothing here is invented; register facts trace to SRC-03 (public register), company facts to SRC-01/02, media to SRC-04/05/06.

data.label: Able.cz s.r.o.
data.summary: Brno software company, the subject of this review. Incorporated 3 Oct 2012.

ident.role: jednatel (statutory officer) + shareholder; markets as CEO

data.summary: Co-founder; registered statutory officer since incorporation.

data.label: T. Melichárek
data.summary: Registered statutory officer since incorporation.

data.label: Blackfish
data.summary: Product studio; Able acquired 100% in 2025 (two-outlet corroboration).

data.summary: Founder of Blackfish; stayed to lead business strategy after the acquisition.

data.label: R. Juhaňák
data.summary: Register shareholder; marketed as CSO — statutory status not confirmed.

data.summary: Register shareholder (investment vehicle linked to Zdeněk Sluka in media).

data.label: 5326G s.r.o.
data.summary: Register shareholder (minority stake).

data.summary: Media-reported 2023 investor; ~5% stake. Self-reported, single-outlet.

data.label: L. Grolig

data.label: able.cz
data.summary: Company website; seat and identity on it match the register.

data.summary: Registration court. The register file (C 85425) contradicts the company GDPR page (C 85424).

data.label: Websupport (DNS/hosting)
data.summary: able.cz nameservers and A records resolve to Websupport infrastructure (measured 2026-07-17).

data.label: Google Workspace (email)
data.summary: able.cz mail routes to Google (MX smtp.google.com) — Google Workspace.

data.summary: Current able.cz TLS certificates are issued by Let's Encrypt; an Amazon-issued certificate is also present in certificate-transparency logs.

data.summary: Named client (self-reported).

data.label: Arkadia

data.label: Encall
data.summary: Named client (self-reported).

data.label: Taste Town
data.summary: Named client (self-reported).

data.label: statutory officer + shareholder
data.why: The public register records Václav Faraga as a jednatel (statutory officer) of Able.cz s.r.o. since incorporation, and among the shareholders.

data.label: statutory officer + shareholder
data.why: The public register records Tomáš Melichárek as a jednatel (statutory officer) since incorporation.

data.label: shareholder
data.why: The register lists Radek Juhaňák among the shareholders. The website additionally markets him as CSO, which is not a statutory office.

data.label: supervisory board
data.why: The register records Libor Polanský as a supervisory-board member from 13 Oct 2020.

data.label: shareholder (111 620 CZK)
data.why: The register lists ZenX Capital a.s. as a shareholder holding 111 620 CZK; media ties ZenX to investor Zdeněk Sluka.

data.label: shareholder (9 975 CZK)
data.why: The register lists 5326G s.r.o. as a shareholder holding 9 975 CZK.

data.label: investor ~5% (2023, media)
data.why: CzechCrunch reported (2023) that Marek Kříž's Point FM took ~5% for CZK 4m at an CZK 80m valuation. Single-outlet, not register-confirmed here.

data.label: marketing CTO (not in register)
data.why: The website presents Lukáš Grolig as CTO. He was not found in the register statutory body or shareholder list, so this is a marketing role, not a verified statutory office.

data.label: acquired 100%
data.why: Two independent outlets (Forbes, CzechCrunch) reported that Able acquired 100% of the product studio Blackfish in 2025.

data.label: founder
data.why: Vít Schlesinger is reported as the founder/owner of Blackfish prior to the acquisition.

data.label: leads business strategy
data.why: After the acquisition, Schlesinger stayed on to lead Able's business strategy (client relations in CZ and Denmark).

data.label: operated by
data.why: The able.cz website presents the company's identity and legal pages; the seat on the GDPR page matches the register.

data.label: registered — C 85425
data.why: Able is registered at the Regional Court in Brno under file C 85425 (register). The company's own GDPR page cites C 85424 — a contradiction left visible; the register is authoritative.

data.label: resolves via (A 31.43.160.6)
data.why: able.cz A records (31.43.160.6, 31.43.161.6) and authoritative nameservers are Websupport, measured via Google Public DNS on 2026-07-17.

data.label: email via (MX)
data.why: able.cz MX record points to smtp.google.com (priority 10) — Google Workspace.

data.label: TLS issued by
data.why: Current TLS certificates for able.cz are issued by Let's Encrypt (certificate transparency, crt.sh).

data.label: named client
data.why: Able names AAA Auto as a client with quantified results; a named client is evidence of a stated relationship, not of the result.

data.label: named client
data.why: Able names Aures Holdings as a client (self-reported).

data.label: named client
data.why: Able names Arkadia as a client; the 600% ROI figure is self-reported.

data.label: named client
data.why: Able names Encall as a client (self-reported).

data.label: named client
data.why: Able names Taste Town as a client (self-reported).
